common.tagline: AI-Powered Investment Analysis — Analyzing the future, empowering decisions.
common.description: Faheem is an agentic AI platform for Saudi investment firms — grounded analysis, citations, and audit trails for Lunar Investments.

login.title: Sign in to Faheem
login.subtitle: Your Lunar Investments workspace
login.caption: Analyzing the future, empowering decisions.
login.footer: SSO & enterprise controls on the MVP roadmap

agents.title: Agents
agents.subtitle: 7 specialist teams · 20+ agents — orchestrated, auditable, human-gated.
agents.gate2: Human gate — the analyst reviews every deliverable
agents.orchestratorDesc: Routes and sequences tasks across the specialist teams
agents.advisoryOnly: Advisory only — the investment decision rests with the committee.

methods.screening: Intake questionnaire · Mandate-fit scorecard · Policy checks vs IC Charter
methods.research: Screening universe · Filings ingestion · News & expert-network sweep
methods.doc-intel: Prospectus/CIM extraction · Footnote & related-party analysis · Covenant summaries
methods.valuation: DCF (FCFF/FCFE, WACC, Gordon TV) · Trading comps · Precedents · LBO-lite · Sensitivity & scenarios
methods.comparables: Comp-set construction · Multiple regression vs growth/margin
methods.risk: Quantified risk scorecard (probability × impact) · Scenario-weighted return · Mandate-breach & concentration checks
methods.writing: IC memos · Research notes · Pitch decks · Periodic reports
methods.compliance: Shariah screening (AAOIFI) · Fact-check vs source · Sanctions & conflicts · Confidence flags
methods.ic: Committee Q&A · Deal ranking vs the 15% hurdle · Scenario sensitivity

chat.title: Ask Faheem IC
chat.intro: Ask for a ranking, a hurdle check, or what would change the call — every answer cites the underlying analysis and the mandate.
chat.thinking: Faheem IC is weighing the cases…
chat.suggest1: Rank these deals — strongest risk-adjusted case?
chat.suggest2: Does each deal clear our IRR hurdle?
